codeReview.summary: TTS voice integration is complete. Created ttsSettingsStore (Zustand) to cache TTS voice/rate/pitch. App.tsx fetches TTS settings on load. VoiceControls.speak() now passes cached voice/rate/pitch to voiceAPI.synthesize(). Settings page updates the TTS store cache when settings are saved.

summary: TTS voice integration verified: Zustand store created for caching TTS settings, App.tsx fetches on load, VoiceControls uses cached settings for synthesis. Settings page updates cache on save.
